boardDescription: Manage board tasks in the active project by status. Drag cards within or across columns to update them instantly.
boardTodoDescription: Tasks added to the board but not started yet.
boardTodoEmpty: No tasks in To Do yet.
boardInProgressDescription: Tasks that are currently being worked on.
boardDoneDescription: Tasks completed in the last 72 hours and kept on the board.
boardMoveTaskError: Task could not be moved to the board.
boardRemoveTaskError: Task could not be removed from the board.
